items.title: This is just the 2nd NBA Finals in which the home team has lost each of the first 3 games of the series.
items.body_excerpt:
This is just the 2nd NBA Finals in which the home team has lost each of the first 3 games of the series.

The 1st such occurrence came in 1993, when the Chicago Bulls opened the Finals with two road wins over the Phoenix Suns before the Suns returned the favor in Game 3.

(via @statitudes.com)
#NBA

items.title: Total Net Points | Game Three
items.body_excerpt:
Total Net Points | Game Three

Victor Wembanyama and Steph Castle help power the Spurs to victory in a must win game three.

images.alt:
Alt text:

Horizontal bar chart titled “Knicks vs Spurs | Total Net Points | NBA Finals | Game Three.” Orange bars represent Knicks players; black bars represent Spurs players. Bars extend right for positive Net Points and left for negative.

Top positive performers: Victor Wembanyama leads all players at +7.5, followed by Stephon Castle +4.1, OG Anunoby +3.4, Julian Champagnie +2.8, KAT +2.2, Josh Hart +1.9, Jordan Clarkson +1.3, Mitchell Robinson +1.2, Luke Kornet +1.1, Devin Vassell +0.8, and Jeremy Sochan +0.3.

Negative performers: Jose Alvarado -0.7, Carter Bryant -0.9, Keldon Johnson -1.6, Brunson -1.6, Miles McBride -2.1, Mikal Bridges -3.5, De’Aaron Fox -4.5, Dylan Harper -5.3, and Landry Shamet -6.3.

X-axis runs from -12 to +12. Data source: ESPN Analytics. Visualization by @HoopInformatics.bsky.social.
